description: You are an AMR systems engineer preparing a warehouse delivery robot simulation. Configure the energy parameters for the 'DELIVERY_AMR' robot to match physical hardware by setting the 'battery' field to include 1800000 (Current Energy), 1800000 (Maximum Energy), and 2000 (Energy Upload Speed). Additionally, set the 'cpuConsumption' field to 15.0 and the 'consumptionFactor' for both 'left_wheel_motor' and 'right_wheel_motor' to 3.5. Save the modified world to /home/ga/Desktop/amr_power_sim.wbt.
